title: Crispy Eastern-Style Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and crispy stir fry dish inspired by the Eastern cuisine, made with a variety of ingredients and a crunchy twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced carrots and bell peppers and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the sliced mushrooms and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until they are tender.
Add the crispy fried onions and stir-fry for 1 minute, or until they are well combined with the vegetables.
Add the Eastern-style stir fry sauce and stir-fry for 1 minute, or until the sauce is well combined with the vegetables.
Add the chopped cilantro and stir-fry for 30 seconds, or until the cilantro is wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional crispy fried onions if desired.
Cook the Middle Eastern potato separately by boiling or baking until tender.
Serve the cooked potato alongside the stir fry.
